THE FOLLOWING IS SECURITY CLEARANCE INFRARED — CLEARED FOR ALL CITIZENS. May | be of assistance? 
Sure. Why don't you tell me how this game works? ''m sorry, citizen, That information is not available at this time. 
What do you mean, it’s not available? You are not yet a Troubleshooter. Therefore your security clearance is infrared. The rules fare security clearance Red. You are not cleared to know the rules, At your service, 
Huh? Most games are real eager to teach you the rules. 
‘Not Paranoia. in Paranoia, you don't know who your friends are. You don't know who your enemies are. You don't know how your equipment works, You don't know the rules ‘One thing you know: everyone is out to get you. Stay alert! Trust no one! Keep your laser handy! Ignorance and fear; fear and ignorance. Those are our watchwords. 
The back cover copy says something about a computer. The Computer is your friend! Trust The Computer, In Paranoia, you play a Toubleshooter in ser= Vice to The Computer. You are The Computer's trusted agent 
How did't get to be a Troubleshooter? 
You turned in a friend for treason, He was ‘executed for betraying The Computer. The ‘Computer rewarded you for your loyalty 
What is a Troubleshooter supposed to do? 
Your jb isto root outall traitors and execute them, In other words, to find trouble... and then to shoot I 
What's a “traitor?” 
A traitor is an evil and malevolent human ‘who has betrayed his friend The Computer and seeks to destroy The Computer, humanity, ‘Alpha Complex and life as we know it. Titors must be unmasked and destroyed, ‘All mutants are traitors. They are genetical- ly imperfect. They have no place in utopia ‘They must be eliminated. All members of secret societies are traitors, ‘They belong, to organizations not officially sanctioned by The Computer. They conspire against The Computer. They must be destroyed, By the way... YoU are a mutant, And a member of a secret society. 
Vim a mutant? That's right. All Troubleshooters would be eager to unmask you as a traitor and execute you. You work with many Troubleshooters, All Cf them carry powerful weapons. 
Let me get this straight. I'm a traitor. The punishment for treason is death. My job is to hunt down and kill traitors. | work with ‘ther people, who have the same orders, All of them want to kill me, 
Not exactly. All ofthem want to kil traitors. They don't know you're a Commie mutant traitor. yet ‘And if they find out that 'm a mutant, they'll ill met 
‘They'll try, OF course, if you convict them of treason first, then they will be executed, and you may survive, OF course, false accusations Of treason are themselves treason, S01 want to prove that they're traitors before they can prove that I'm a traitor, And if 1 don't. I die, Precisely, Watch out! Taitors are everywhere! By the way: dead traitors cannot testity to their own innocence — or against you. itis best to shoot first and ask questions later, Stay alert! Trust no one! Keep your laser handy! 
‘Are you sure this is going to be funt Certainly, citizen! Of course it will be fun, The Computer says 40, and The Computer is your friend. Can you doubt The Computer? Doubting The Computer is treason, Not No, certainly not. f The Computer says this will be fun, then this certainly will be fun, Only a Commie mutant traitor could believe otherwise,
